name: litnup
description: LITNUP — the verification layer underneath the AI agent economy. Monorepo for contracts, agent runtime, SDK, subgraph, and web.

scripts.agent:setup: cd agent-runtime && python -m venv .venv && .venv/bin/pip install -r requirements.txt
scripts.agent:run: cd agent-runtime && python -m agent_runtime.paper_trade --strategy momentum --asset BTC --duration 1h
scripts.agent:test: cd agent-runtime && python tests/test_pnl_tracker.py && python tests/test_oracle_signer.py && python tests/test_metrics.py && python tests/test_eip712_roundtrip.py
scripts.subgraph:deploy: cd subgraph && graph deploy --product hosted-service litnup/litnup
scripts.all:test: npm run test:contracts && npm run test:sdk && npm run agent:test
